name: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited
summary: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Limited manufactures and sells fertilizers and chemicals in India. It offers beneficiated rock phosphate, sulphuric acid, single super phosphate, granulated single super phosphate, sulphur bentonite, phosphate rich organic manure, and oleum products. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Bhilwara, India.
